/legal/privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy - Ramp Marketing
/legal/privacy-policy.description: Review Ramp’s legal information, including terms of service, privacy policy, and other important disclosures.
p: Ramp Marketing Company (“Ramp,” “we,” “us,” or “our”) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you visit our website or purchase our products and services.
We may collect the following types of information:
Billing information (processed securely via third-party providers)
Deliver digital products, courses, and subscriptions
Communicate updates, product releases, and support messages
Improve our website, content, and offerings
We do not sell your personal information.
Ramp uses cookies and similar technologies to:
Understand how visitors interact with our content
You can disable cookies through your browser settings, but some features may not function properly.
We rely on trusted third-party tools to operate our business, including:
These providers only receive the information necessary to perform their services and are required to protect your data.
We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information.However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
Access the personal information we hold about you
Opt out of marketing communications at any time
To exercise these rights, contact us using the details below.
If you subscribe to our mailing list:
You may receive educational content, updates, and promotions
You can unsubscribe at any time using the link in our emails
Transactional emails (e.g., purchase confirmations) will still be sent when necessary.
We retain personal information only as long as necessary to:
Ramp does not knowingly collect personal information from individuals under the age of 18.If you believe a minor has provided us with data, please contact us and we will remove it.
Your information may be stored or processed outside your country of residence.By using our services, you consent to such transfers in accordance with this policy.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.
Changes will be posted on this page
Continued use of our services means acceptance of the updated policy

/legal/terms-of-service.title: Terms & Conditions - Ramp Marketing
/legal/terms-of-service.description: Review Ramp’s legal information, including terms of service, privacy policy, and other important disclosures.
p: By accessing or purchasing from Ramp Marketing Company (“Ramp,” “we,” “us,” or “our”), you agree to the following Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully.
Ramp Marketing Company provides educational content, digital products, courses, templates, and subscription-based resources focused on marketing, design, and business growth.
Any related services offered by Ramp
By using our services, you confirm that:
You are at least 18 years old
You have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement
You will use our products for lawful purposes only
All digital products are delivered electronically
Access is granted immediately or shortly after purchase
Course access is granted for the duration specified at purchase
We reserve the right to update, modify, or improve course content over time
Billing occurs on a recurring basis (monthly or annually, as stated at checkout)
You may cancel at any time before your next billing cycle
No partial refunds are issued for unused time
Access remains active until the end of the paid period
Modify subscription pricing with advance notice
Add, remove, or adjust included features
All prices are listed in USD
Payments are processed via third-party providers (e.g., Stripe, Lemon Squeezy)
You are responsible for any applicable taxes, duties, or fees
Due to the digital nature of our products:
All sales are final, unless otherwise stated at checkout
No refunds are provided once content has been accessed or downloaded
Subscription cancellations stop future billing but do not issue refunds for past charges
If a refund exception is offered, it will be clearly stated on the product page.
is the exclusive intellectual property of Ramp Marketing Company.
Use materials for your personal or internal business use
Copy or reproduce content for commercial resale
Claim Ramp materials as your own
Upload malicious code or attempt unauthorized access
Harass, abuse, or harm other users or Ramp staff
To the maximum extent permitted by law:
Ramp is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the product or subscription
Ramp may reference or integrate third-party tools, platforms, or services.
Downtime or service interruptions outside our control
Suspend or terminate access for violations of these Terms
Remove content or discontinue services at any time
Termination does not entitle you to a refund.
We may update these Terms at any time.
Changes will be posted on our website
Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms
